productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Ezeiro Silver Black Shoe
description: CompositionBlack soccer shoes made of synthetic leather, EVA sockliner and Traxion outsoleWash care1. Clean surface with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washBuilt specifically for the fast and agile pace of modern players of soccer, these sneakers from the house of adidas have ample cushioning and support to ensure that the feet are well protected even when playing on hard surfaces. The Traxion sole with appropriately placed lugs ensures ample traction on tough terrain, making this footwear an absolute pleasure when playing. It also looks great when teamed with jeans or casuals.
